title: Action Number Generation
content: start([START: Action creation requires unique action number])

s2[2. SELECT FOR UPDATE on TenantSequence for current tenant
SELECT current_value FROM actions.tenant_sequences
WHERE tenant_id = tenant_id
FOR UPDATE
Row-level lock prevents concurrent reads until COMMIT]

s3[3. Increment sequence counter
current_value = current_value + 1
UPDATE actions.tenant_sequences
SET current_value = new_value
WHERE tenant_id = tenant_id]

s4[4. Format action number
ACT-counter padded to 4+ digits
e.g., ACT-0001, ACT-0042, ACT-1337, ACT-10000]

s5[5. Commit transaction
Releases row-level lock,
allowing next concurrent request to proceed]
